description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened] condition or fail a save against an ingested poison.

Requirements You can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath].

Thanks to control of your stomach, you can expel foreign substances in your body with ease. Reduce your sickened condition by 2, and immediately attempt a saving throw with a +2 circumstance bonus against any ingested poisons you've been exposed to within the last minute. You can't use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath] for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.
